Official and Delaware state pages disagree for the Newark campus, while CMS CCN 080001 and HCRIS are combined reporting entities; no federal value was allocated to Newark or Wilmington.
Pennsylvania, POS, and HCRIS report the combined Temple entity while the official source separately labels Episcopal; no shared value was allocated to either campus.
Joint-ownership/alliance language and official, POS-certified, and HCRIS bases require downstream adjudication.
Current official language calls Children's a third hospital, while the governed slice must preserve its co-located/embedded reporting ambiguity rather than count it automatically.
